findings.message: No agent instruction files found (neither `.cursor/rules/*.mdc` nor `.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md`)
findings.suggestion: add at least one Cursor rule under `.cursor/rules/` or one Claude skill under `.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` so coding agents have project-specific guidance

findings.message: No MCP config file found — design system is not declared as AI-agent-accessible
findings.suggestion: create `.mcp.json` (Claude Code), `.cursor/mcp.json` (Cursor), or `claude_desktop_config.json` declaring at least one MCP server with a `command`

findings.message: No migration/upgrade guide found — AI agents (and humans) upgrading across versions have no documented path for breaking changes
findings.suggestion: add a MIGRATION.md / UPGRADING.md (or a `## Migration` section in the CHANGELOG) describing how to move across breaking versions

findings.message: No llms.txt at repo root — AI agents have no top-level map of the design system
findings.suggestion: add an llms.txt file (llmstxt.org spec) with an H1 title, a blockquote summary, and `## <section>` link lists

findings.message: package.json 'types' points to 'build/ts/src/index.d.ts' which does not exist — build output is missing or path is wrong
findings.suggestion: run the package build, or update the 'types' field to point at the produced .d.ts file

findings.message: Off-scale spacing: 1px
Off-scale spacing: 1px
Off-scale spacing: 1px
Hardcoded box-shadow `none !important` — elevation should come from a shadow token scale
findings.suggestion: reference a shadow token (e.g. `--shadow-sm`, `--elevation-2`) instead of a raw box-shadow

findings.message: Hardcoded color value: rgba(241, 242, 244, 1)
Hardcoded font-size `1em` — typography should come from a type token scale
findings.suggestion: reference a typography token (e.g. `--font-size-md`, `--font-weight-semibold`) instead of a raw value

findings.suggestion: reference a radius token (e.g. `--radius-md`) instead of a raw length

findings.suggestion: reference a radius token (e.g. `--radius-md`) instead of a raw length

findings.message: Hardcoded border-radius `8px` — corner radius should come from a radii token scale
findings.suggestion: reference a radius token (e.g. `--radius-md`) instead of a raw length

findings.message: Inline <svg> has no accessible treatment — a decorative icon should be `aria-hidden`, and a meaningful one needs `role="img"` + a label
findings.suggestion: add `aria-hidden="true"` if the icon is decorative, or `role="img" aria-label="…"` (or a <title> child) if it conveys meaning

findings.message: Hardcoded color value: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)
<div> has a click handler but no role — keyboard and screen-reader users can't operate it (use <button>, or add role + tabIndex + a key handler)
findings.suggestion: replace <div onClick> with a <button>, or add role="button" tabIndex={0} and an onKeyDown handler

findings.message: Reserved AI tokens (--p-color-bg-fill-magic-secondary, --p-color-text-magic) used in a non-AI surface (src/components/Badge/Badge.module.css). AI-reserved visual tokens should be scoped to AI features.
findings.suggestion: Either scope this token usage to an AI surface (co-locate an AI-marker component) or use a general-purpose token here. Reusing AI-reserved tokens on non-AI UI dilutes the AI visual signal (Appendix A: ai-token-misused-on-non-AI-element).

findings.message: Inline <svg> has no accessible treatment — a decorative icon should be `aria-hidden`, and a meaningful one needs `role="img"` + a label
findings.suggestion: add `aria-hidden="true"` if the icon is decorative, or `role="img" aria-label="…"` (or a <title> child) if it conveys meaning

findings.message: Hardcoded border-radius `3px` — corner radius should come from a radii token scale
findings.suggestion: reference a radius token (e.g. `--radius-md`) instead of a raw length

findings.message: Hardcoded `linear-gradient()` — gradients should come from a token, not inline literals
findings.suggestion: define the gradient as a token (CSS custom property `--gradient-*`, or a DTCG/theme entry) and reference it via `var(--gradient-*)`

findings.message: Off-scale spacing: 0.1275rem

findings.suggestion: reference a shadow token (e.g. `--shadow-sm`, `--elevation-2`) instead of a raw box-shadow

findings.message: Hardcoded box-shadow `0 0 0 100px currentColor inset` — elevation should come from a shadow token scale
findings.suggestion: reference a shadow token (e.g. `--shadow-sm`, `--elevation-2`) instead of a raw box-shadow

findings.message: <div> has a click handler but no role — keyboard and screen-reader users can't operate it (use <button>, or add role + tabIndex + a key handler)
findings.suggestion: replace <div onClick> with a <button>, or add role="button" tabIndex={0} and an onKeyDown handler

findings.message: Reserved AI tokens (--p-color-bg-fill-magic, --p-color-bg-surface-magic, --p-color-bg-surface-magic-hover, --p-color-border-magic-secondary, --p-color-border-magic-secondary-hover) used in a non-AI surface (src/components/Checkbox/Checkbox.module.css). AI-reserved visual tokens should be scoped to AI features.
findings.suggestion: Either scope this token usage to an AI surface (co-locate an AI-marker component) or use a general-purpose token here. Reusing AI-reserved tokens on non-AI UI dilutes the AI visual signal (Appendix A: ai-token-misused-on-non-AI-element).

findings.message: Inline `<svg>` has no `viewBox` — a fixed-size icon without a viewBox does not scale and can crop
findings.suggestion: add a `viewBox` (e.g. `viewBox="0 0 24 24"`) so the icon scales cleanly at any size; keep width/height for the default render size

Reserved AI tokens (--p-color-bg-surface-magic, --p-color-bg-surface-magic-hover, --p-color-border-magic-secondary, --p-color-border-magic-secondary-hover, --p-color-icon-magic, --p-color-text-magic) used in a non-AI surface (src/components/Select/Select.module.css). AI-reserved visual tokens should be scoped to AI features.
findings.suggestion: Either scope this token usage to an AI surface (co-locate an AI-marker component) or use a general-purpose token here. Reusing AI-reserved tokens on non-AI UI dilutes the AI visual signal (Appendix A: ai-token-misused-on-non-AI-element).

Inline <svg> has no accessible treatment — a decorative icon should be `aria-hidden`, and a meaningful one needs `role="img"` + a label
findings.suggestion: add `aria-hidden="true"` if the icon is decorative, or `role="img" aria-label="…"` (or a <title> child) if it conveys meaning

<div> has a click handler but no role — keyboard and screen-reader users can't operate it (use <button>, or add role + tabIndex + a key handler)

findings.message: Inline `<svg>` has no `viewBox` — a fixed-size icon without a viewBox does not scale and can crop
findings.suggestion: add a `viewBox` (e.g. `viewBox="0 0 24 24"`) so the icon scales cleanly at any size; keep width/height for the default render size

Reserved AI tokens are present (3 found) but no AI-marker component was detected in the export surface or component files
findings.suggestion: ship a dedicated AI-marker component (e.g. AILabel, AIBadge, or a magic-prefixed component) so consumers can visually mark AI-generated content

findings.message: No theme-mode signal found — design system does not appear to define light/dark modes
findings.suggestion: add a `prefers-color-scheme` media query, a `[data-theme]` selector, a `.dark`/`.light` class convention, or a DTCG token group named `dark`/`light`

findings.message: No AGENTS.md found — coding agents have no command-first instructions
findings.suggestion: create AGENTS.md at repo root with command-first sections (runnable shell commands + expected exit codes)

findings.message: No component manifest JSON found — MCP tools fall back to source-file reads
findings.suggestion: create a `components.json` or `lyse.components.json` listing your components ({ name, sourceFile }) so MCP servers can serve component lookups at ~5× lower cost than reading source files
